hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.php"?\s*[,}]'; then F=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+\.php"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); if [ -n "$F" ] && [ -f "$F" ]; then for D in 模範解答プロジェクト 提供プロジェクト; do if echo "$F" | grep -q "$D"; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/$D" 2>/dev/null && [ -f vendor/bin/pint ] && vendor/bin/pint "$F" 2>/dev/null; break; fi; done; fi; fi
